reportingPaths.title: Repository entry inventory
reportingPaths.summary: Start from TOC entries, then add parent, volume, and template context.

reportingPaths.title: Field metadata and values
reportingPaths.summary: Use field definitions with property values to report entry metadata.

reportingPaths.title: Document pages and electronic documents
reportingPaths.summary: Use entry and page tables to review page counts, image sizes, and text inventory.

reportingQuestions.question: Which templates, fields, and document metadata structures exist?
reportingQuestions.guidance: Start with template and field tables, then use relationships to find document or entry associations.

reportingQuestions.question: How are users, trustees, and access-related records represented?
reportingQuestions.guidance: Start with trustee/security tables and verify joins carefully before reporting access state.
